prompt: Do triceps become the prime mover near max bench loads, and does that mean I should prioritize triceps accessories over pec-focused work?
assertions: Argues the claim is overstated or a measurement artifact
Explains the long head triceps biarticular mechanism (ramps up disproportionately at max loads)
Cites evidence that benching grows lateral triceps more than long head
References data (e.g., Duffy's dissertation) showing pecs/delts/lateral triceps increase activation similarly
Practical takeaway: don't abandon pec work; train bench-relevant musculature broadly
